evals.name: tag-support
evals.prompt: /tdd-plan add tag support for bookmarks — users should be able to add tags when creating a bookmark, filter bookmarks by tag, and remove tags
evals.expected_output: Task files in _tasks/ with vertically-sliced stories, concrete ACs referencing existing Bookmark model and routes, proper dependency ordering

evals.name: jwt-auth-refactor
evals.prompt: /tdd-plan refactor auth from base64 token to proper JWT with token expiration and refresh tokens — remove the current base64 approach
evals.expected_output: Task files mixing [REMOVE] ACs for base64 auth with Given/When/Then ACs for JWT, referencing src/middleware/auth.js

evals.name: full-text-search
evals.prompt: /tdd-plan add full-text search across bookmarks — search by URL, title, and tags, with pagination
evals.expected_output: Task files with vertically-sliced stories (not layer-split), technical notes about SQLite FTS, pagination ACs with concrete query params
